articles.title: What killed Americans in 1776? The answer is dramatically different from today - Fox News
articles.description: Life expectancy rose from 30 to nearly 80 years as infectious diseases gave way to chronic conditions like heart disease, cancer and diabetes.
articles.content:
The leading causes of death have changed dramatically since America's founding 250 years ago, highlighting how far medicine has come.
Diseases that once devastated communities have largely given way… [+10752 chars]

articles.author: Rick Porter
articles.title: TV Ratings: U.S. World Cup Match Hits All-Time High for Soccer in America - The Hollywood Reporter
articles.description: The American men's victory over Bosnia and Herzegovina draws more than 24 million viewers in early Nielsen ratings.
articles.content:
The U.S. men’s first knockout stage victory at a World Cup in 24 years set a ratings record for soccer in the United States. 
The U.S. win over Bosnia and Herzegovina Wednesday averaged 24.43 millio… [+2029 chars]

articles.title: House Democrats accuse Trump of 'hijacking' America's 250th birthday for his own gain - NPR
articles.description: A 55-page report from House Democrats accuses Freedom 250 of America's birthday celebrations for profit, using questionable fundraising methods. Watchdog groups had already sounded alarms.
articles.content:
As America's birthday celebrations kick into high gear, so too do criticisms of the preeminent national group organizing them, Freedom 250.
